name: agent-policy
description: Read-only Agent and Codex diagnostics with AGENTS.md policy guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose Agent environments and guide AGENTS.md policy.
interface.longDescription: Use one explicit AgentPolicy entry for read-only repository diagnostics, Windows Codex connectivity troubleshooting, and AGENTS.md policy-template guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use @AgentPolicy to show available diagnostics and policy guidance.
Use @AgentPolicy to diagnose the current repository.
Use @AgentPolicy to troubleshoot recent Codex reconnects.
